name: Shangri-La Frontier | RPG
description:
I've seen only a few RPG's that are a little good. So I'm also trying out this Shangri-la Frontier RPG for myself. Hopefully, I made it to your liking.

Please follow me and join the discord, I also make Phonk/Funk songs that you might like. I really appreciate it. Hopefully this bot will reach 100k messages. {I'm hoping}
creator: xZavkx
